would_pass_checks.basis: Ideal inverting gain = -Rf/Rin = -22k/10k = -2.20; Vout=-2.20*1V=-2.200V. Blocked: no op-amp primitive; spice_subckt=OPAMP_IDEAL has no model source, so validation rejects the design with UNDEFINED_SPICE_MODEL (#55 fixed oracle-first). Flips to outcome=pass when #60 supplies a real op-amp .subckt.
